title: Apple sues OpenAI for alleged theft of trade secrets for its devices
summary: The lawsuit alleges that OpenAI illegally obtained confidential information with the help of a former employee.

title: Shohei Ohtani withdraws from All-Star Game due to knee inflammation after hitting his 21st home run
summary: The Dodgers player also missed a pitching start due to his left knee injury.

title: Spain defeats Belgium and reaches the World Cup semifinals for the first time in 16 years
summary: A goal by Mikel Merino in the second half secured the victory and the pass to the semifinal against France.

title: JAXA successfully lands experimental reusable rocket to reduce costs
summary: The Japanese space agency tested the RV-X rocket, which ascended about ten meters before descending vertically.

title: Typhoon 9 approaches Sakishima Islands with violent winds and risk of landslides
summary: Authorities warn of possible flooding and landslides as the storm passes near Okinawa.

title: Xi Jinping and Kim Jong-un reaffirm their strategic alliance through exchange of letters and meetings
summary: The leaders of China and North Korea highlighted the importance of military cooperation and the defense of common interests.

title: Japanese Munetaka Murakami selected for MLB All-Star Game and will participate in Home Run Derby
summary: The St. Louis Cardinals third baseman returns to the Major Leagues and will be the first Japanese in the contest since Ohtani.

title: Kazuma Okamoto ties home run record for a Japanese rookie in MLB with 22
summary: The Toronto Blue Jays hitter ties the record set by Shohei Ohtani in his first season.

title: Mayako Muroi, Japan's oldest pianist, dies at 105
summary: The renowned pianist, who remained active until her final years, died of natural causes.

title: Trump threatens to bomb Iran if he is assassinated and later agrees to continue talks
summary: The US president toughens his stance against Iran but later accepts to maintain dialogue, amid the calm of attacks.

title: Scandal in Fukuoka assembly: four witnesses claim to have received money from a legislator
summary: The alleged bribery scandal shakes local politics, while the implicated legislator denies the accusations.

title: First trial against a prosecutor in Japan for illegal interrogation and concealment of evidence begins
summary: The accused prosecutor pleads not guilty, alleging he acted within his duties, while his superiors ignored the irregularities.

title: Company Zentohshin declares bankruptcy and Government activates measures to prevent chain bankruptcies
summary: The company, which operated what was believed to be a low-risk business, collapsed due to failures in financial controls.

title: Agreement to expropriate land in Narita allows construction of a new runway
summary: After decades of conflict, the Government, the airport company, and landowners reach a consensus to expand the airport.

title: Lower House approves bill to preserve Japanese imperial family
summary: The bill includes provisions to allow women to retain their status after marriage, amid intense debates.

title: Report reveals that five prosecutors concealed evidence that could have overturned the conviction in the Fukui case
summary: The concealment of key evidence by the prosecution raises doubts about the impartiality of the judicial process.

title: Man injured after being attacked by a bear in his home in Shimane prefecture
summary: The animal entered the house while the victim was sleeping and was shooed away, but returned to attack again.

title: Devastating earthquake in Venezuela leaves more than 4,000 dead and Japanese rescue teams deploy aid
summary: A high-magnitude earthquake shakes Venezuela, causing a humanitarian catastrophe with thousands of victims and massive damage.

title: Low-cost airline EasyJet accepts Apollo's purchase offer for 1.2 trillion yen
summary: The acquisition proposal by the US investment fund values the company at about 12 billion dollars.

title: Large forest fire in Andalusia causes twelve deaths and forces massive evacuations
summary: The flames, fanned by the wind, sweep through extensive areas and authorities investigate whether the victims were trapped while fleeing.
